tasks.description: Create ui-web Dockerfile with multi-stage build for Next.js standalone output, accepting NEXT_PUBLIC_* as build args
steps: Create `ui-web/Dockerfile` using node:22-alpine with multi-stage build
Stage 1 (build): corepack enable pnpm, install deps, accept NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEKIT_URL as ARG, run `pnpm build`
Stage 2 (run): copy standalone output + static + public dirs, expose 3000, CMD node server.js
Add `output: 'standalone'` to `ui-web/next.config.ts` (required for Docker deployment)
Create `ui-web/.dockerignore` with node_modules, .next, .git
tasks.verify: cd ui-web && docker build --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4200 --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEKIT_URL=wss://test.livekit.cloud -t siestai-ui-web . && echo 'ui-web Dockerfile OK'

tasks.description: Create backend Dockerfile for NestJS with multi-stage build, compiling TypeScript and running dist/main
steps: Create `backend/Dockerfile` using node:22-alpine with multi-stage build
Stage 1 (build): corepack enable pnpm, install all deps, run `pnpm build` (nest build → dist/)
Stage 2 (run): copy dist/ and prod node_modules, expose 4200, CMD node dist/main
Create `backend/.dockerignore` with node_modules, dist, .git
tasks.verify: cd backend && docker build -t siestai-backend . && echo 'backend Dockerfile OK'

tasks.description: Create agent Dockerfile for the LiveKit agent worker, using node:22-alpine with TypeScript compilation
steps: Create `agent/Dockerfile` using node:22-alpine with multi-stage build
Stage 1 (build): corepack enable pnpm, install deps, run `pnpm build` (tsc → dist/)
Stage 2 (run): copy dist/ and prod node_modules, CMD node dist/main.js start
Create `agent/.dockerignore` with node_modules, dist, .git
tasks.verify: cd agent && docker build -t siestai-agent . && echo 'agent Dockerfile OK'

tasks.description: Create docs/DOKPLOY-GUIDE.md covering the full deployment workflow: server prep, Dokploy install, Cloudflare DNS, and all 5 services (postgres, mastra, backend, agent, ui-web)
steps: Create `docs/` directory

Write `docs/DOKPLOY-GUIDE.md` with sections: Prerequisites, Server Setup (Hetzner), Dokploy Installation, Cloudflare DNS Configuration, Project Setup in Dokploy, per-service configuration (postgres as Docker image, mastra/backend/agent/ui-web as GitHub repo builds), Environment Variables reference table, Domain & SSL setup, Health checks, Troubleshooting
For each service, document: build context path, Dockerfile path, exposed port, env vars (referencing .env.example files), domain mapping, depends-on relationships
Include Cloudflare DNS records: app.siestai.com → Hetzner IP, api.siestai.com → Hetzner IP
Note WebSocket gotcha: use DNS-only mode (gray cloud) or enable Cloudflare WebSocket support
Document the deploy order: postgres → mastra → backend → agent + ui-web (parallel)
Add section on future Kubernetes migration path as a note
tasks.verify: test -f docs/DOKPLOY-GUIDE.md && wc -l docs/DOKPLOY-GUIDE.md | awk '{if ($1 > 50) print "DOKPLOY-GUIDE.md OK (" $1 " lines)"; else print "FAIL: too short"}'
